programme.title: PL REWIND EP10: LEI v ARS 97/98
programme.sub-title: PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP29: THE MANCHESTER DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP06: WAYNE ROONEY
programme.sub-title: Owen Hargreaves is joined by five time Premier League winner Wayne Rooney, as they took an in-depth look at the career of one of the greatest English players of all time.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS EP03
programme.sub-title: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Abdoulaye Doucoure, Jarrod Bowen, Miguel Almiron and Ezri Konsa.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP03
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Rasmus Højlund (Denmark), Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina), Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) and Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 12/13 MNC v MNU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2012/2013 season.

programme.title: PL REWIND PL30 SPECIAL EP04
programme.sub-title: Rooney: Out Of This World / Last Gasp. PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style.

programme.title: PL REWIND PL30 SPECIAL EP02
programme.sub-title: Game Of The Century / Dennis Bergkamp: A Genius Of Space. PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP29: THE MANCHESTER DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP06: WAYNE ROONEY
programme.sub-title: Owen Hargreaves is joined by five time Premier League winner Wayne Rooney, as they took an in-depth look at the career of one of the greatest English players of all time.

programme.title: THE ART OF... EP01: THE MODERN FORWARD
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined in the Tech Zone by John Hartson and Karen Carney to analyse the evolution of goalscorers and dig deep into just what makes the modern forward tick.

programme.title: GARY NEVILLE'S SOCCERBOX - Series 2 IAN WRIGHT
programme.sub-title: Manchester United legend Gary Neville in conversation with Ian Wright, as they watch through some of the most compelling matches they played in.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 12/13 MNC v MNU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2012/2013 season.

programme.title: PL REWIND PL30 SPECIAL EP04
programme.sub-title: Rooney: Out Of This World / Last Gasp. PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style.

programme.title: PL REWIND PL30 SPECIAL EP02
programme.sub-title: Game Of The Century / Dennis Bergkamp: A Genius Of Space. PL Rewind delves back into the Premier League archive to showcase some memorable matches with players and managers who were key to that game. Talking us through behind-the-scenes stories and major on-pitch moments in true 'directors-commentary' style.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP29: THE MANCHESTER DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP37: THE NORTH LONDON DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable North London Derby clashes between Arsenal and Tottenham.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP08: SOL CAMPBELL
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, this week Freddie Ljungberg catches up with fellow Invincible Sol Campbell to reminisce about Arsenal's remarkable unbeaten season 20 years ago.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP10: JIMMY FLOYD HASSELBAINK
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: THE ART OF... EP02: THE WINGER WITH FREDDIE LJUNGBERG
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined by Freddie Ljungberg to analyse and discuss the evolution of wingers down the years, and deep dive into what makes the perfect wideplayer.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Sheffield United v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW27 Manchester City v Manchester United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 12/13 MNC v MNU
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2012/2013 season.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2012/2013 (MNU)
programme.sub-title: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Aston Villa v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Liverpool v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 LIV v MNC
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP25: (Subbed) DOMINIK SZOBOSZLAI
programme.sub-title: At 22 years of age, Dominik Szoboszlai was named Hungary Captain. Less than a year later, he was a £60 million Liverpool midfielder. Hear the Hungarian sensation’s rise; from the club his father set-up on the outskirts of Budapest, to a blockbuster move to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Chelsea v Newcastle United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Bournemouth v Luton Town
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP15: LEWIS COOK
programme.sub-title: Having been at the heart of the Bournemouth midfield for over 7 years, Lewis Cook charts his rise to the Premier League as he takes The Big Interview to the south coast with his dog, Milo. Injuries have reduced Cook’s minutes on the pitch significantly during his time at the club and during lockdown, his routine of walks along the beach with Milo, helped both his mind and body stay sharp - as he divulges he also cultivated a penchant for gardening, too.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP16: CESC FABREGAS
programme.sub-title: Cesc Febregas’ Premier League career started out at Arsenal when he made his debut at just 16 years-old. Having won titles in both England and Spain as well as becoming a World Cup winner in 2010, it was recently announced that he had taken interim charge of Italian Serie B side, Como. Fabregas talks to Steve Bower about his footballing education at La Masia, Barcelona, playing under Arsene Wenger at Arsenal, Jose Mourinho at Chelsea as well as his hopes for the future in management.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP05
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium), Bruno Guimaraes (Brazil), Virgil Van Dijk (Netherlands) and Julián Álvarez (Argentina).

programme.title: PL REWIND EP08: TOT v WIG 09/10
programme.sub-title: Jermain Defoe joins Steve Bower to re-live a memorable day at White Hart Lane from November 2009 where he scored 5 goals in a 9-1 win against Wigan.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP25: TOT v AVL 07/08
programme.sub-title: On the evening that marked Tottenham's 125-year anniversary, Aston Villa visited White Hart Lane and played out a thrilling 4-4 draw. Spurs duo Paul Robinson and Pascal Chimbonda join Steve Bower to relive the occasion.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Aston Villa v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Liverpool v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP15: PEP v KLOPP
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we look back at some of enthralling encounters between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and Jurgen Klopp's Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP52: (Subbed) JURGEN KLOPP
programme.sub-title: Over the past 9 years, Jurgen Klopp has been an integral Premier League figure. With the help of former and current colleagues, fans, and friends, we look how he made the Reds a force to be reckoned with once again.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP03
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Rasmus Højlund (Denmark), Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina), Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) and Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Chelsea v Newcastle United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Bournemouth v Luton Town
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP49: BILL FOLEY
programme.sub-title: Upon creating an American Ice Hockey team, owner Bill Foley outlandlishly claimed his team would lift the Stanley Cup in six years. His dream came true. Now, owner of AFC Bournemouth and flying in the Premier League, he’s already making bold claims for the Cherries’ future.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP39: KICKS AND CULTURE STATESIDE
programme.sub-title: The Premier League is seeing a big boost in popularity amongst the Black American population and we travelled Stateside to learn more about this growing appeal. The show is led by Aaron Dolores, football fan and founder of Black Arrow, a creative movement on a quest to promote the intersection of football and black culture, not just in the US but worldwide. He takes us on a journey where we meet varying characters from the Mayor of Birmingham Alabama, Randall Woodfin, former players Tim Howard and Jozy Altidore, to current player Chris Richards as well as authentic Black American fans immersed in Premier League culture.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 Jermain Defoe
programme.sub-title: Jermain Defoe names the best 11 players they have played with or against.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP23: JERMAIN DEFOE
programme.sub-title: Jermain Defoe is one of the most prolific goal-scorers the Premier League has ever witnessed, netting 162 times in the competition. In this show we find out where that obsession to find the back of the net began, how it was developed and who helped to make it happen while finding out what is next for Jermain after retiring in 2022.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP02
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring William Saliba (France), Dominik Szoboszlai (Hungary), Miguel Almirón (Paraguay) and Phil Foden (England).

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Aston Villa v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Liverpool v Manchester City
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) GILBERTO SILVA
programme.sub-title: Arsenal legend and Invincible Gilberto Silva takes us back to winning the 2002 World Cup with Brazil, his early years at Arsenal and his first footballing steps in a small Brazilian town before he shines light onto the ever-famous Invincibles season with the help of Ray Parlour, Thierry Henry, Martin Keown, Patrick Vieira and none other than Arsene Wenger. Gilberto charts at all his personal and professional highs and lows.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP03
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Rasmus Højlund (Denmark), Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina), Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) and Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) RUUD GULLIT
programme.sub-title: Lauded as one of the greatest footballers of his generation, Ruud Gullit’s venture into management brought about mixed fortunes, including a well-publicised fallout with Ex-Newcastle striker Alan Shearer. Here Gullit and Shearer lift the lid on what really went on behind the scenes at the club and how a huge gamble by the Dutchman backfired in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Chelsea v Newcastle United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW28 Bournemouth v Luton Town
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP15: LEWIS COOK
programme.sub-title: Having been at the heart of the Bournemouth midfield for over 7 years, Lewis Cook charts his rise to the Premier League as he takes The Big Interview to the south coast with his dog, Milo. Injuries have reduced Cook’s minutes on the pitch significantly during his time at the club and during lockdown, his routine of walks along the beach with Milo, helped both his mind and body stay sharp - as he divulges he also cultivated a penchant for gardening, too.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) JUNINHO
programme.sub-title: At the height of his career, Brazilian midfielder Juninho Paulista made a decision that would make him a legend on Teeside forever. The 2002 World Cup winner wrote his name into Middlesbrough F.C. folklore when he signed for the club not once, not twice, but three times! He sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his fond memories of that time, his emotional reaction to their relegation and find out what he’s up to now after hanging up his boots.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: GARY NEVILLE'S SOCCERBOX - Series 3 DIMITAR BERBATOV
programme.sub-title: Manchester United legend Gary Neville in conversation with Dimitar Berbatov, as they watch through some of the most compelling matches they played in.

programme.title: GARY NEVILLE'S SOCCERBOX - Series 3 ROBERT PIRES
programme.sub-title: Manchester United legend Gary Neville in conversation with Robert Pires, as they watch through some of the most compelling matches they played in.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS EP04
programme.sub-title: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Leandro Trossard, Anthony Elanga, Casemiro, Harry Wilson and Thomas Frank with Christian Norgaard.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP18: ROBERT SNODGRASS
programme.sub-title: Robert Snodgrass joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 Dimitar Berbatov
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP16: LES FERDINAND
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch. With guest Les Ferdinand.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP01
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Bukayo Saka (England), Jérémy Doku (Belgium), Luis Díaz (Colombia) and Rodri (Spain).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: (Subbed) ERLING HAALAND
programme.sub-title: He’s only been at Manchester City for one year, but striker Erling Haaland has already sent records tumbling in the Premier League. We join the 23-year-old in his native Norway to reflect on his blockbuster season and catch up with his father and former Man City player Alfie to show how the youngster is coping as footballs hottest property!

programme.title: PL STORIES EP45: DWIGHT YORKE
programme.sub-title: The missing piece of the jigsaw that helped United win a historic treble in 1999. Dwight Yorke takes us on his journey from the paradise settings of Trinidad & Tobago to the top of English football.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP13: DWIGHT YORKE
programme.sub-title: Dwight Yorke joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP01: PHIL JONES
programme.sub-title: We join ex-Manchester United defender Phil Jones to reflect on his time in the Premier League and the highs and lows he experienced in his time at Old Trafford. We also go behind the scenes at Carrington as he begins his new venture into coaching.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS EP04
programme.sub-title: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Leandro Trossard, Anthony Elanga, Casemiro, Harry Wilson and Thomas Frank with Christian Norgaard.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP18: ROBERT SNODGRASS
programme.sub-title: Robert Snodgrass joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 Dimitar Berbatov
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP16: LES FERDINAND
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch. With guest Les Ferdinand.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP01
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Bukayo Saka (England), Jérémy Doku (Belgium), Luis Díaz (Colombia) and Rodri (Spain).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 West Ham United v Aston Villa
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW29 Fulham v Tottenham Hotspur
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: (Subbed) ERLING HAALAND
programme.sub-title: He’s only been at Manchester City for one year, but striker Erling Haaland has already sent records tumbling in the Premier League. We join the 23-year-old in his native Norway to reflect on his blockbuster season and catch up with his father and former Man City player Alfie to show how the youngster is coping as footballs hottest property!

programme.title: PL STORIES EP45: DWIGHT YORKE
programme.sub-title: The missing piece of the jigsaw that helped United win a historic treble in 1999. Dwight Yorke takes us on his journey from the paradise settings of Trinidad & Tobago to the top of English football.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP13: DWIGHT YORKE
programme.sub-title: Dwight Yorke joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MNC v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP24: (Subbed) JULIAN ALVAREZ
programme.sub-title: Julián Álvarez boasts a career more illustrious than many players can imagine, clinching the treble with Manchester City and securing a World Cup victory for his homeland, Argentina. The diminutive forward reflects on his humble origins in Calchin and how they paved the path to Premier League success.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP02: THE CHAMPIONS
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined by Premier League winners Owen Hargreaves and Peter Schmeichel to discuss the best title-winning teams in the Premier League era. Expect insightful anecdotes, interesting archive and lively debate across a packed hour-long programme.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) FOXES FANTASY WORLD
programme.sub-title: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years. In that time they completed the great escape after being dead and buried at the foot of the table and then followed that up with the most unthinkable of Premier League triumphs. This is their story, one of sports greatest triumphs, told by those who wrote it.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP15: KIERON DYER
programme.sub-title: Kieron Dyer had the World. Playing as a Premier League footballer, he enjoyed all the trappings of a top-flight star. As well as representing his hometown club Ipswich Town, he went on to play for amongst others Newcastle United where he struck up a close friendship with Sir Bobby Robson. But behind the smiles was a dark secret that he kept hidden since he was a boy. A secret that would destroy relationships around him and would very nearly break him mentally. Here, the Englishman candidly opens up about that time and how one phone call could have changed his whole life.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP20: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal, Manchester City and Tottenham striker Emmanuel Adebayor had the honour of playing alongside some of the Premier League's greatest ever players and the African star sat down with Will Perry to select his all-time best eleven teammates.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP33: ARS v MCI
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable encounters between Arsenal and Manchester City in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP46: (Subbed) CROATIANS IN THE PREMIER LEAGUE
programme.sub-title: Over the years the Premier League has been awash with top end talent originating from Croatia, from Slaven Bilic to Luca Modric, Nico Kranjcar to Mateo Kovacic. We sit down with those superstars to chart the rise of footballing success in the Country and who to look out for as future Premier League stars?

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH 13/14 MNC v ARS
programme.sub-title: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2013/2014 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: KYLE WALKER
programme.sub-title: A gripping insight and in-depth look at the life and times of one of England’s most talented defenders; Kyle Walker. From his early days as a youth player at Sheffield United to his meteoric rise with Tottenham Hotspur and his current stint at Manchester City, this show traces his journey to becoming a household name in English football. With exclusive interviews and special access, we find out about the sacrifices and triumphs that have defined Walker’s career.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP20: EMMANUEL ADEBAYOR
programme.sub-title: Former Arsenal, Manchester City and Tottenham striker Emmanuel Adebayor had the honour of playing alongside some of the Premier League's greatest ever players and the African star sat down with Will Perry to select his all-time best eleven teammates.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP02: THE CHAMPIONS
programme.sub-title: Will Perry is joined by Premier League winners Owen Hargreaves and Peter Schmeichel to discuss the best title-winning teams in the Premier League era. Expect insightful anecdotes, interesting archive and lively debate across a packed hour-long programme.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP43: (Subbed) FOXES FANTASY WORLD
programme.sub-title: After watching their already relegated side lose to the Invincibles on the last day of the 2003/4 Premier League season, some Leicester City fans stayed behind to watch Arsenal lift the trophy at Highbury. Those fans endured ten years in the wilderness, only for Leicester to return to the big time and embark on a rollercoaster couple of years. In that time they completed the great escape after being dead and buried at the foot of the table and then followed that up with the most unthinkable of Premier League triumphs. This is their story, one of sports greatest triumphs, told by those who wrote it.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP15: KIERON DYER
programme.sub-title: Kieron Dyer had the World. Playing as a Premier League footballer, he enjoyed all the trappings of a top-flight star. As well as representing his hometown club Ipswich Town, he went on to play for amongst others Newcastle United where he struck up a close friendship with Sir Bobby Robson. But behind the smiles was a dark secret that he kept hidden since he was a boy. A secret that would destroy relationships around him and would very nearly break him mentally. Here, the Englishman candidly opens up about that time and how one phone call could have changed his whole life.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Newcastle United v West Ham United
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 23/24 MW30 Manchester City v Arsenal
programme.sub-title: Each Premier League game from the 2023/24 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP33: ARS v MCI
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable encounters between Arsenal and Manchester City in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP46: (Subbed) CROATIANS IN THE PREMIER LEAGUE
programme.sub-title: Over the years the Premier League has been awash with top end talent originating from Croatia, from Slaven Bilic to Luca Modric, Nico Kranjcar to Mateo Kovacic. We sit down with those superstars to chart the rise of footballing success in the Country and who to look out for as future Premier League stars?

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: PETER DRURY
programme.sub-title: Legendary commentator Peter Drury puts down his mic and swaps the stadium gantry for the warmth of the studio alongside Manish Bhasin, as he reminisces upon the 10 greatest moments he’s witnessed in Premier League History.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP13: ANDY TOWNSEND
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP01: PHIL JONES
programme.sub-title: We join ex-Manchester United defender Phil Jones to reflect on his time in the Premier League and the highs and lows he experienced in his time at Old Trafford. We also go behind the scenes at Carrington as he begins his new venture into coaching.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) JUNINHO
programme.sub-title: At the height of his career, Brazilian midfielder Juninho Paulista made a decision that would make him a legend on Teeside forever. The 2002 World Cup winner wrote his name into Middlesbrough F.C. folklore when he signed for the club not once, not twice, but three times! He sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his fond memories of that time, his emotional reaction to their relegation and find out what he’s up to now after hanging up his boots.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) GILBERTO SILVA
programme.sub-title: Arsenal legend and Invincible Gilberto Silva takes us back to winning the 2002 World Cup with Brazil, his early years at Arsenal and his first footballing steps in a small Brazilian town before he shines light onto the ever-famous Invincibles season with the help of Ray Parlour, Thierry Henry, Martin Keown, Patrick Vieira and none other than Arsene Wenger. Gilberto charts at all his personal and professional highs and lows.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP02
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring William Saliba (France), Dominik Szoboszlai (Hungary), Miguel Almirón (Paraguay) and Phil Foden (England).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: KYLE WALKER
programme.sub-title: A gripping insight and in-depth look at the life and times of one of England’s most talented defenders; Kyle Walker. From his early days as a youth player at Sheffield United to his meteoric rise with Tottenham Hotspur and his current stint at Manchester City, this show traces his journey to becoming a household name in English football. With exclusive interviews and special access, we find out about the sacrifices and triumphs that have defined Walker’s career.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP27: (Subbed) ALEXIS MAC ALLISTER
programme.sub-title: From winning the World Cup to becoming Liverpool’s new number 10, Alexis Mac Allister has had an incredible 12 months. We return to Argentina as Alexis and his family tell us how his childhood dreams have become a reality. A remarkable footballing heritage that has crossed Maradona and Messi, his story has it all.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP04: STEVE MCMANAMAN'S ALL-TIME LIVERPOOL 1-TO-11
programme.sub-title: Liverpool legend Steve McManaman, joins Will Perry to unveil his ultimate all-time Liverpool XI. In a rapid-fire discussion, he picks some of the most iconic Liverpool players, revealing a dream team lineup that embodies the club's historic greatness.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP02: JAMIE CARRAGHER
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg meets Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher to discuss the impact Jürgen Klopp’s had at Anfield and whether Liverpool can win a second Premier League title this season.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP10: JIMMY FLOYD HASSELBAINK
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: PL GOATS DUTCH STARS
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Guests Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink and Jaap Stam will discuss Dutch players and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP03
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Rasmus Højlund (Denmark), Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina), Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) and Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP05
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium), Bruno Guimaraes (Brazil), Virgil Van Dijk (Netherlands) and Julián Álvarez (Argentina).

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP01: PETER DRURY
programme.sub-title: Legendary commentator Peter Drury puts down his mic and swaps the stadium gantry for the warmth of the studio alongside Manish Bhasin, as he reminisces upon the 10 greatest moments he’s witnessed in Premier League History.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP13: ANDY TOWNSEND
programme.sub-title: A former Premier League star sits down to select the best team they played with, guiding us through their picks from 1-to-11 and including insights and anecdotes from on and off the pitch.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP01: PHIL JONES
programme.sub-title: We join ex-Manchester United defender Phil Jones to reflect on his time in the Premier League and the highs and lows he experienced in his time at Old Trafford. We also go behind the scenes at Carrington as he begins his new venture into coaching.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP08: (Subbed) JUNINHO
programme.sub-title: At the height of his career, Brazilian midfielder Juninho Paulista made a decision that would make him a legend on Teeside forever. The 2002 World Cup winner wrote his name into Middlesbrough F.C. folklore when he signed for the club not once, not twice, but three times! He sits down with PL Stories to reflect on his fond memories of that time, his emotional reaction to their relegation and find out what he’s up to now after hanging up his boots.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) GILBERTO SILVA
programme.sub-title: Arsenal legend and Invincible Gilberto Silva takes us back to winning the 2002 World Cup with Brazil, his early years at Arsenal and his first footballing steps in a small Brazilian town before he shines light onto the ever-famous Invincibles season with the help of Ray Parlour, Thierry Henry, Martin Keown, Patrick Vieira and none other than Arsene Wenger. Gilberto charts at all his personal and professional highs and lows.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP04
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kai Havertz (Germany), Darwin Núñez (Uruguay), Edson Álvarez (Mexico) and Bernardo Silva (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP02
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring William Saliba (France), Dominik Szoboszlai (Hungary), Miguel Almirón (Paraguay) and Phil Foden (England).

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: KYLE WALKER
programme.sub-title: A gripping insight and in-depth look at the life and times of one of England’s most talented defenders; Kyle Walker. From his early days as a youth player at Sheffield United to his meteoric rise with Tottenham Hotspur and his current stint at Manchester City, this show traces his journey to becoming a household name in English football. With exclusive interviews and special access, we find out about the sacrifices and triumphs that have defined Walker’s career.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP27: (Subbed) ALEXIS MAC ALLISTER
programme.sub-title: From winning the World Cup to becoming Liverpool’s new number 10, Alexis Mac Allister has had an incredible 12 months. We return to Argentina as Alexis and his family tell us how his childhood dreams have become a reality. A remarkable footballing heritage that has crossed Maradona and Messi, his story has it all.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP04: STEVE MCMANAMAN'S ALL-TIME LIVERPOOL 1-TO-11
programme.sub-title: Liverpool legend Steve McManaman, joins Will Perry to unveil his ultimate all-time Liverpool XI. In a rapid-fire discussion, he picks some of the most iconic Liverpool players, revealing a dream team lineup that embodies the club's historic greatness.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP02: JAMIE CARRAGHER
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg meets Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher to discuss the impact Jürgen Klopp’s had at Anfield and whether Liverpool can win a second Premier League title this season.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP10: JIMMY FLOYD HASSELBAINK
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, former Arsenal Invincible Freddie Ljungberg reveals the secrets of succeeding in the Premier League, in discussion with a host of Premier League stars both past & present.

programme.title: PL GOATS DUTCH STARS
programme.sub-title: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Guests Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink and Jaap Stam will discuss Dutch players and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP03
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Rasmus Højlund (Denmark), Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina), Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) and Bruno Fernandes (Portugal).

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS EP05
programme.sub-title: The World Beaters strand returns to hero the Premier League stars who will be leading men for their national teams competing in the Copa América held in the United States and UEFA Euro 2024 in Germany. Featuring Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium), Bruno Guimaraes (Brazil), Virgil Van Dijk (Netherlands) and Julián Álvarez (Argentina).

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (GB: HAALAND)
programme.sub-title: From free kicks to bicycle kicks, relive some of the most memorable strikes from 2023/24 in a Premier League season where there’s been a record number of goals scored.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP03: FULL-BACKS WITH MARIO MELCHIOT
programme.sub-title: With the fierce debate of classic defensive fullback versus attack-minded wing-back as prominent as ever, Mario Melchiot joins Will Perry to discuss who is the greatest Premier League fullback of all time.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP19: NEMANJA VIDIC
programme.sub-title: Nemanga Vidic joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP30: JOHN STONES
programme.sub-title: With over a decade of experience playing in the Premier League, John Stones welcomes former Everton teammate Leon Osman to the Manchester City training ground to discuss the finer points of his game. From the risks he took as a young defender, to developing his skills under Pep Guardiola at City, the pair watch footage of Stones defend and dissect how and why his unique characteristics can help his side build from the back.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP25: LEVI COLWILL
programme.sub-title: Chelsea defender, Levi Colwill takes a walk around the club’s training ground in Cobham with former Chelsea WSL star, Karen Carney. The 20-year old goes into detail about the art of defending and how he uses his body to position himself on the pitch to help the team. He also shares his thoughts on playing under Roberto De Zerbi whilst on loan at Brighton, coming through the ranks at Chelsea and why wearing the number 26 shirt means so much to him.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP04: JOHN TERRY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP48: HALL OF FAME 2024 INDUCTEES
programme.sub-title: We head to London to go behind the scenes at the Premier League Hall of fame event night and meet the three newest inductees to secure their place amongst English footballs elite!

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) GILBERTO SILVA
programme.sub-title: Arsenal legend and Invincible Gilberto Silva takes us back to winning the 2002 World Cup with Brazil, his early years at Arsenal and his first footballing steps in a small Brazilian town before he shines light onto the ever-famous Invincibles season with the help of Ray Parlour, Thierry Henry, Martin Keown, Patrick Vieira and none other than Arsene Wenger. Gilberto charts at all his personal and professional highs and lows.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP07: ARSENE WENGER
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, the latest episode of Freddie Ljungberg’s UNSEEN sees him sit down with his former manager Arsène Wenger. Twenty years on from the Invincibles, they look back at Arsenal’s famous unbeaten season, relive the rivalry with Sir Alex Ferguson and discuss the impact that Klopp and Pep are having on the game today.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP08: SOL CAMPBELL
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, this week Freddie Ljungberg catches up with fellow Invincible Sol Campbell to reminisce about Arsenal's remarkable unbeaten season 20 years ago.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP37: THE NORTH LONDON DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable North London Derby clashes between Arsenal and Tottenham.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP29: THE MANCHESTER DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP24: (Subbed) JULIAN ALVAREZ
programme.sub-title: Julián Álvarez boasts a career more illustrious than many players can imagine, clinching the treble with Manchester City and securing a World Cup victory for his homeland, Argentina. The diminutive forward reflects on his humble origins in Calchin and how they paved the path to Premier League success.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: KYLE WALKER
programme.sub-title: A gripping insight and in-depth look at the life and times of one of England’s most talented defenders; Kyle Walker. From his early days as a youth player at Sheffield United to his meteoric rise with Tottenham Hotspur and his current stint at Manchester City, this show traces his journey to becoming a household name in English football. With exclusive interviews and special access, we find out about the sacrifices and triumphs that have defined Walker’s career.

programme.title: PL GOATS EP03: FULL-BACKS WITH MARIO MELCHIOT
programme.sub-title: With the fierce debate of classic defensive fullback versus attack-minded wing-back as prominent as ever, Mario Melchiot joins Will Perry to discuss who is the greatest Premier League fullback of all time.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 EP19: NEMANJA VIDIC
programme.sub-title: Nemanga Vidic joins Will Perry on the 1-to-11 sofa to select his all-time best eleven teammates. They dig into his career, recalling standout players and memorable moments.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP30: JOHN STONES
programme.sub-title: With over a decade of experience playing in the Premier League, John Stones welcomes former Everton teammate Leon Osman to the Manchester City training ground to discuss the finer points of his game. From the risks he took as a young defender, to developing his skills under Pep Guardiola at City, the pair watch footage of Stones defend and dissect how and why his unique characteristics can help his side build from the back.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP25: LEVI COLWILL
programme.sub-title: Chelsea defender, Levi Colwill takes a walk around the club’s training ground in Cobham with former Chelsea WSL star, Karen Carney. The 20-year old goes into detail about the art of defending and how he uses his body to position himself on the pitch to help the team. He also shares his thoughts on playing under Roberto De Zerbi whilst on loan at Brighton, coming through the ranks at Chelsea and why wearing the number 26 shirt means so much to him.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP04: JOHN TERRY HALL OF FAME SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Considered a legend at Stamford Bridge, John Terry won no fewer than five League titles at Chelsea as well as lifting the F.A. Cup five times and the Champions League trophy. We find out what set him apart from his peers and where he rates amongst the very best in the World.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP48: HALL OF FAME 2024 INDUCTEES
programme.sub-title: We head to London to go behind the scenes at the Premier League Hall of fame event night and meet the three newest inductees to secure their place amongst English footballs elite!

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON 2023/2024 (MNC)
programme.sub-title: The 2023/24 Premier League season will be forever remembered as one of the greatest campaigns ever. From an absorbing title race, Jürgen Klopp leaving Liverpool to Luton living the dream in the top-flight – Review of the Season documents all of the thrilling stories to emerge across the 380 matches.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP05: (Subbed) COPA AMERICA TRAILBLAZERS
programme.sub-title: With the Copa America in full swing, we take a look at South American footballers to have blazed a trail in the Premier League over the years and see who’s set to shine in this year’s tournament.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP16: (Subbed) GILBERTO SILVA
programme.sub-title: Arsenal legend and Invincible Gilberto Silva takes us back to winning the 2002 World Cup with Brazil, his early years at Arsenal and his first footballing steps in a small Brazilian town before he shines light onto the ever-famous Invincibles season with the help of Ray Parlour, Thierry Henry, Martin Keown, Patrick Vieira and none other than Arsene Wenger. Gilberto charts at all his personal and professional highs and lows.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS EP09: THIERRY HENRY'S TOP 10 PL MOMENTS
programme.sub-title: Arguably the greatest striker the Premier League has ever seen, Thierry Henry sits down with Will Perry to reveal his Top 10 Premier League Moments.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP07: ARSENE WENGER
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, the latest episode of Freddie Ljungberg’s UNSEEN sees him sit down with his former manager Arsène Wenger. Twenty years on from the Invincibles, they look back at Arsenal’s famous unbeaten season, relive the rivalry with Sir Alex Ferguson and discuss the impact that Klopp and Pep are having on the game today.

programme.title: FREDDIE LJUNGBERG'S UNSEEN EP08: SOL CAMPBELL
programme.sub-title: In partnership with Viaplay, this week Freddie Ljungberg catches up with fellow Invincible Sol Campbell to reminisce about Arsenal's remarkable unbeaten season 20 years ago.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP37: THE NORTH LONDON DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable North London Derby clashes between Arsenal and Tottenham.

programme.title: PL REWIND EP29: THE MANCHESTER DERBY
programme.sub-title: This week on PL Rewind we bring you highlights from some of the most memorable Manchester Derbies in the Premier League era.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP51: CHAMPIONS SPECIAL
programme.sub-title: Season 2023 - 2024 has arguably been the greatest since the birth of the Premier League in 1992. Three elite teams racing to the finish line. Each of them believing this season will end in glory. The script of the story is captivating. Manchester City going for an historic fourth consecutive Premier League title. Arsenal looking for their first title in twenty years following their late season collapse in 2023. Liverpool looking to give their manager Jurgen Klopp the perfect send off as he says good-bye to Anfield after nine years. With the help of leading celebrity fans, the managers and senior players each twist and turn of the season is highlighted. The narrative of the season is like no other. The Champions Story 2023 - 2024 tells a very special story.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP24: (Subbed) JULIAN ALVAREZ
programme.sub-title: Julián Álvarez boasts a career more illustrious than many players can imagine, clinching the treble with Manchester City and securing a World Cup victory for his homeland, Argentina. The diminutive forward reflects on his humble origins in Calchin and how they paved the path to Premier League success.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP26: KYLE WALKER
programme.sub-title: A gripping insight and in-depth look at the life and times of one of England’s most talented defenders; Kyle Walker. From his early days as a youth player at Sheffield United to his meteoric rise with Tottenham Hotspur and his current stint at Manchester City, this show traces his journey to becoming a household name in English football. With exclusive interviews and special access, we find out about the sacrifices and triumphs that have defined Walker’s career.
